where.if:
AND
cmm_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' cmm_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' code_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' code_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
(cmm_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR cmm_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR code_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR code_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')

mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
cmm_name DESC, cmm_id, code_id code_id DESC, cmm_id code_name DESC, cmm_id, code_id user_input DESC, cmm_id, code_id use_yn DESC, cmm_id, code_id cmm_id DESC, code_id
mapper.select:
SELECT cmm_id, cmm_name, code_id, code_name, code_tag, code_remark, user_input, use_yn FROM tb_common
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT cmm_id, cmm_name, code_id, code_name, code_tag, code_remark, user_input, use_yn FROM tb_common
SELECT cmm_id, MAX(cmm_name) AS cmm_name FROM tb_common GROUP BY cmm_id ORDER BY cmm_id

SELECT cmm_id, cmm_name, code_id, code_name FROM tb_common WHERE cmm_id = #{cmmId} AND use_yn = 'Y'
AND (code_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR code_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
ORDER BY code_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_common (cmm_id, cmm_name, code_id, code_name, code_tag, code_remark, user_input, use_yn) VALUES (#{cmmId}, #{cmmName}, #{codeId}, #{codeName}, #{codeTag}, #{codeRemark}, ISNULL(#{userInput}, 'N'), ISNULL(#{useYn}, 'Y'))
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_common WHERE cmm_id = #{cmmId} AND code_id = #{codeId} AND user_input = 'Y'
